title: Upgrade ToolRegistry — Cache wiring, fromPlugin error wrapping, cache stats
consumer_purpose: Wire upgraded ToolCache and error types through ToolRegistry for all 58 tools and plugin bridge
content:
## PLAN REVISION 2 — Narrowed to registry.ts only

### Context
Lane 0b (ToolCache upgrade) has completed cache.ts (206 lines) and tool.ts (318 lines):
- cache.ts: CacheConfig, CacheStats, TTL eviction, LRU eviction, size enforcement, stats tracking
- tool.ts: ToolError/TimeoutError/TransientError/ValidationError hierarchy, cache integration in wrap(), tool Def extensions

### What remains for Lane 0c (this lane)

**File: packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts** (currently 628 lines, dirty with 6 additions/2 deletions)

#### Change 1: Yield ToolCache.Service and expose cache stats
- Add `const cache = yield* ToolCache.Service` after existing service yields
- Add `cacheStats` to the `Interface` type: `readonly cacheStats: () => Effect.Effect<ToolCache.CacheStats>`
- Implement `cacheStats` method that proxies to `cache.stats()`
- Add to `Service.of({ ... })` return

#### Change 2: fromPlugin() error wrapping
- Wrap the plugin execute block in `Effect.catchAll` that converts any thrown error into a structured `ExecuteResult` with `{ title, metadata: { status: "error" }, output: error message }`
- This prevents plugin errors from hitting the `Effect.orDie` boundary

#### Change 3: Preserve all pre-existing dirty changes
- 6 additions / 2 deletions from prior session (ToolCache import, recordStressWave/recordExecutionWave vars, Layer.provide)
- Use targeted smart_sd operations to avoid touching unrelated code

### Non-changes (already done by other lanes)
- ✅ Error hierarchy (ToolError, etc.) — already in tool.ts
- ✅ CacheConfig type and defaults — already in cache.ts  
- ✅ TTL, LRU eviction, size enforcement — already in cache.ts
- ✅ Tool namespace re-export — already via `export * as Tool from "./tool"`

### Verification
```bash
cd packages/opencode && bun run typecheck
```
revision_notes: Narrowed scope to registry.ts only after discovering Lane 0b already completed cache.ts and tool.ts upgrades. Addressed all 4 critic objections: (1) removed tool.ts error-class additions, (2) fromPlugin uses catchAll returning structured ExecuteResult, (3) no Context.Tag for CacheConfig, (4) correct 5 claim atoms.
